{{Quote|Daddy! Daddy!|The first words of Gorga's son|<ref name="Boba Fett: Murder Most Foul">''[[Boba Fett: Murder Most Foul]]''</ref>}}
A '''Huttlet''' was born to [[Anachro]] and [[Gorga Desilijic Aarrpo/Legends|Gorga Desilijic Aarrpo]], the grandchild of [[Orko]] the [[H'uun]] and a great-nephew of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].<ref name="Boba Fett: Murder Most Foul" />
